top_signals.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
top_signals.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Trump admin allows Anthropic to release Mythos AI model to some companies, government agencies
top_signals.summary: Anthropic disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with a government export control directive citing "national security authorities."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Brazil’s Rayan cramming for Japan test in World Cup knockout stage
top_signals.summary: The five-time champion faces the Asian side in the round of 32 in Houston on Monday.
